arts.ttl: ‘We have to’ - Erik ten Hag opens up on Ineos target for Manchester United
arts.sum: Man Utd face Tottenham on Sunday it what is already shaping up to be a crucial fixture in the race for the Champions League places.

arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Tottenham in Premier League fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man Utd play Spurs in the Premier League on Sunday and our writers have shared their preferred XIs.

arts.ttl: 3 key battles that could decide Man Utd vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur will top the billing in the Premier League this weekend, with the two top four-chasing sides facing off at Old Trafford on Sunday. His improved form comes at a pretty perfect time for Tottenham, as they'll need Solanke at his very best if they're going to beat Man Utd at Old Trafford - a place they've notoriously struggled down the years.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag backed to keep his job as Leny Yoro closes on return
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is back under pressure following Manchester United's awful start to the season but is hoping to kickstart the campaign against Tottenham on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Louis Saha sends Man Utd warning ahead of crunch Tottenham clash
arts.sum: The former Manchester United frontman has told his old club to watch out for an in-form Dominic Solanke when they face Tottenham

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Arsenal join Brighton in £5m winger transfer battle after scouting mission
arts.sum: Premier League and top clubs from across Europe are keeping tabs on Hammarby's talented teenage attacking gem Bazoumana Toure, who is tearing up the Sweden's Allsvenskan

arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke reveals private conversation with Harry Kane and insists Tottenham 'are not scared of anyone' ahead of their Premier League clash against Manchester United
arts.sum: Solanke appears to have found his footing in north London and will arrive at Old Trafford to face Manchester United on Sunday on the back of two goals in as many games.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are searching for a fourth straight victory in all competitions when they travel to Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon to face Manchester United in the Premier League. However, a trip to Old Trafford will prove a much trickier proposition, with Postecoglou failing to win there last season.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Tottenham
arts.sum: After a frustrating goalless draw with Crystal Palace last weekend where Man Utd's profligacy robbed them of victory, the Red Devils responded with a tepid 1-1 stalemate with Dutch outfit FC Twente in their Europa League opener. RB: Noussair Mazraoui - A promising start to the Moroccan's Man Utd career will be put to the test on Sunday if Spurs skipper Heung-min Son is passed fit .

arts.ttl: Key quotes part two of Ten Hag press conference ahead of Man Utd v Tottenham
arts.sum: We have a good squad, but with young players. I don't read, of course, all the criticism, not even possible, but I don't want either to know.
